iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 16:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear signals. Iran reveals 42K+ civilian sites damaged. Trump threatens Kharg Island strikes “just for fun” — escalatory rhetoric but no nuclear dimension. Space Research Centre severely damaged. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 16:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Trump threatens Kharg Island “just for fun” (AJ) — escalatory rhetoric. Araghchi: strikes launched from Ras Al-Khaimah & near Dubai. Iran reveals 42K+ civilian sites damaged. Iran claims US/Israel using copycat “Lucas” drones. IRGC 50th wave ongoing. Zero diplomacy. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 16:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). 4 killed overnight in Lebanon strikes. West Bank family killing (2 children, 2 adults) already captured. Sirens in central Israel from Iranian barrages. 826+ killed in Lebanon. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Erdogan vows Turkey “will not be dragged into Iran war.” 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Russia-ME developments. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. No new China/Taiwan developments. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING. No new DPRK developments since 10-missile salvo on Mar 14. Kim Yo Jong condemns Freedom Shield. 47 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 16:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Russia launches 68 missiles + 282 guided bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h. 740 Russian personnel lost. 144 combat engagements. Ukraine intercepts 90/97 overnight drones. Poland scrambles jets. Moldova drone intrusion. US paused ceasefire talks. Ukraine assesses negotiation viability in 1-2 weeks. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 17:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities. 115K+ displaced. No ceasefire signals. Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT (Day 16 17:04):
- Iran: War enters Day 17. Trump says ‘not ready for deal.” Pro-Iran militias claim 23+ drone strikes on US assets in Iraq. Zero diplomacy.
- Israel-Lebanon: West Bank family killing. 826+ dead.
- Russia-Ukraine: Kyiv strike kills 4. US ceasefire talks stalled. G7 criticizes sanctions waiver for Russia.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Pakistan strikes Kandahar facilities. 115K displaced. No ceasefire.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical. Zero diplomatic progress. Day 17 begins.

latest_news.headline: Guardians of the Blood Brigade claim Baghdad airport attacks; Islamic Resistance claims 23+ drone strikes on Erbil
latest_news.text: Pro-Iran militia claims attacks on US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport and Erbil. Islamic Resistance in Iraq claims 23+ drone strikes on US assets in Erbil.

latest_news.headline: Trump says ‘not ready for a deal’ with Iran — Gulf countries report new attacks
latest_news.text: Trump declares US not ready to negotiate with Iran. At least 6 killed, 130+ wounded in UAE from Iranian strikes. Iran war enters third week.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities as tensions hit ‘red line’
latest_news.text: Pakistan announces military strikes against targets in southern Afghanistan — Kandahar military facilities and TTP hideouts. 115K+ displaced. No ceasefire signals.

latest_news.headline: G7 partners rebuke Trump for easing Russian oil sanctions amid Iran war
latest_news.text: European leaders criticize Trump’s decision to temporarily ease sanctions on Russian oil sales. German chancellor says decision is wrong. Pressure on Moscow should increase, not decrease.

latest_news.headline: Russia-Kyiv strike kills 4, wounds 15 — peace talks stalled
latest_news.text: Russian strike on Kyiv region kills 4 and wounds 15. US paused ceasefire talks between Russia and Ukraine due to Iran war.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine offers drone defense expertise to Middle Eastern nations
latest_news.text: Zelensky says Ukraine wants money and technology in return for helping Middle Eastern nations defend against Iranian kamikaze drones. Kyiv sent specialists to four countries.

latest_news.headline: Trump slams Zelensky as ‘far more difficult’ to deal with than Putin
latest_news.text: Trump admits Putin could be helping Iran despite envoy claims. Calls Zelensky ‘far more difficult’ than Putin. Zelensky says ME focus ‘not good for Ukraine.’

latest_news.headline: Iran war enters third week — no diplomatic off-ramps in sight
latest_news.text: Day 17 approaches. Tehran claims US attacked from UAE soil. US Embassy in Baghdad struck. Multiple fronts active. Zero diplomatic progress.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 17:04). WAR ENTERS DAY 17 — MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Trump ‘not ready for deal.” Pro-Iran militias claim 23+ drone strikes on US assets in Iraq. G7 criticizes sanctions waiver. Ukraine sends drone defense experts to ME. Zero diplomacy.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): West Bank family killed. 826+ dead in Lebanon. No ceasefire.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): Kyiv strike kills 4, wounds 15. US ceasefire talks stalled. G7 rebukes Trump sanctions waiver. Zelensky: ME focus ‘not good for Ukraine.’

(4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): Pakistan strikes Kandahar. 115K displaced.
(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.
(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47. (8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25.

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Day 17 begins.
